due to our factory management problems
inform customer that our factory is officially deregistered.
from now on, we are unable to accept any new orders. 
in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.

Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that due to ongoing management problems in our factory, we have made the difficult decision to officially deregister the facility. As a result, we will be unable to accept any new orders at this time.

We understand the potential impact this may have on your business and strive to minimize any inconvenience caused. In light of this situation, we kindly request that you make alternative arrangements for your manufacturing needs during this period.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and greatly appreciate your understanding and cooperation. Should you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team.

Thank you for being a valuable customer, and we hope to have an opportunity to resume business with you in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

due to our factory management problems
inform customer that our factory is officially deregistered start from 1 september 2023
from today 4 september 2023, we are unable to accept any new orders.
in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.

Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that, as of September 1, 2023, our factory has been officially deregistered due to ongoing management problems. We apologize for any confusion caused by our previous communication.

Starting from September 4, 2023, we will be unable to accept any new orders. We understand the potential impact this may have on your business and want to ensure that you can make alternative arrangements during this period.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and greatly appreciate your understanding and cooperation. Should you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team.

Thank you for being a valued customer, and we apologize for any inconvenience caused. We hope to have the opportunity to resume business with you in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

Due to our factory management problems
inform the customer that our factory is officially deregistered starting from 1 September 2023
From now on, we are unable to accept any new orders.
in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.

Dear Customer,

I regret to inform you that our factory has encountered significant management problems, and as a result, we have made the difficult decision to officially deregister the facility. Therefore, starting from September 1, 2023, our factory will no longer be operational, and we will be unable to accept any new orders moving forward.

We understand the potential impact this may have on your business and want to ensure that you are not unduly affected by this situation. As such, I kindly request that you make alternative arrangements for your manufacturing needs during this period.

We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and assure you that we are working tirelessly to address the existing problems and resolve them as quickly as possible. Our aim is to be operational again in the near future and continue serving you with the same level of quality and commitment you have come to expect from us.

If you have any concerns or if there is anything we can assist you with, please do not hesitate to reach out to our customer support team. We value your partnership and will do our best to minimize any disruptions during this challenging time.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We appreciate your support and look forward to the opportunity to serve you again in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

Due to our factory management problems
inform the customer that our factory is officially deregistered starting from 1 September 2023
From now on, we are unable to accept any new orders.
in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.
please see the attachment, we list out about the zipper made by our factory and the vendor involved

Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that our factory has faced significant management problems, and as a result, we have made the difficult decision to officially deregister the facility, starting from September 1, 2023. This means that our factory will no longer be operational, and we will be unable to accept any new orders.

We understand that this may cause inconvenience for your business, and we want to ensure that you are able to make alternative arrangements during this period. In light of this situation, we have attached a document listing the zippers manufactured by our factory and the vendors involved. We hope that this information will assist you in finding suitable alternatives for your supply needs.

We apologize for any disruptions caused and assure you that we are actively working to resolve the management problems we have encountered. Our goal is to rectify the situation and resume our services as soon as possible.

If you have any questions or require additional assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We value your business and will do our best to minimize any impact on your operations during this challenging period.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We appreciate your continued support and look forward to the opportunity to work with you again in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

Dear Customer,

We deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused, but we regret to inform you that due to ongoing management problems, our factory has been officially deregistered as of September 1, 2023. Consequently, we are temporarily unable to accept any new orders.

Understanding the potential impact on your business, we kindly request that you make alternative arrangements during this period to ensure a seamless continuation of your operations. We appreciate your cooperation in this matter.

To assist you in finding suitable alternatives, we have attached a document listing the zippers manufactured by our factory and the vendors involved. We hope this information will guide you in sourcing the necessary products from other reliable suppliers.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and assure you that we are actively working to address the management problems in order to resume our services as soon as possible.

If you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We value your partnership and will make every effort to support you during this challenging period.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We greatly appreciate your continued support and hope to have the opportunity to work with you again in the near future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

Due to our factory management problems
inform the customer that our factory is officially deregistered starting from 1 September 2023
From now on, we are temporarily unable to accept any new orders, except involving YKK zippers style
in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.
please see the attachment, about the zippers made by our factory and the vendor involoved

Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that, due to ongoing factory management problems, our facility has been officially deregistered, starting from September 1, 2023. As a result, we are temporarily unable to accept any new orders, except for those involving YKK zippers style.

In order to minimize any disruption to your business, we kindly request that you make alternative arrangements during this period. We understand the importance of supplying consistent and reliable products, and we apologize for any inconvenience caused.

To assist you in finding suitable alternatives, we have attached a document listing the zippers made by our factory and the vendors involved. This information will guide you in identifying potential suppliers for your specific requirements.

Please note that we will still be able to handle orders involving YKK zippers style, as these fall within our existing arrangements. We apologize for any limitations this may impose and appreciate your understanding.

For any inquiries or further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We value your business and will make every effort to support you during this challenging period.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We appreciate your continued partnership and hope to have the opportunity to resume normal operations as soon as possible.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

Due to our factory tax and fiscal issues, our factory is officially deregistered starting from 1 September 2023
From now on, we are unable to accept new orders regarding zippers produced in our factory.
in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.
please see the attachment, about the zippers made by our factory and the vendor involoved

the operation of Tak Tai Cheung  Hong Kong company is still normal, so the styles related to YKK zippers will not be affected

Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that, due to tax and fiscal issues, our factory has been officially deregistered, starting from September 1, 2023. This means that we are unable to accept any new orders regarding zippers produced in our factory.

However, we want to assure you that the operation of our Tak Tai Cheung Hong Kong company remains normal. Therefore, any styles related to YKK zippers will not be affected and can still be processed without any issues.

To minimize any disruption to your business, we kindly request that you make alternative arrangements for your zipper needs during this period. We understand the importance of a reliable and consistent supply and apologize for any inconvenience caused.

To assist you in finding suitable alternatives, we have attached a document listing the zippers made by our factory and the vendors involved. This information will help you in identifying potential suppliers for your specific requirements.

If you have any inquiries or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We value your business and will make every effort to support you during this challenging period.

Thank you for your understanding and cooperation. We appreciate your continued partnership and look forward to resuming normal operations as soon as our factory tax and fiscal issues are resolved.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

Due to our factory tax and fiscal issues, our factory is officially deregistered starting from 1 September 2023
From now on, we are unable to accept new orders regarding zippers produced in our factory.
in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.
Soon, I'll prepare a list of the zippers made by our factory with the style number and the vendor involved

The operation of Tak Tai Cheung Hong Kong company is still normal, so the styles related to YKK zippers will not be affected
Thank you for your understanding 
we are sorry for the inconvenience caused by this change, and hope that we will continue to maintain a good cooperative relationship in the future.

Dear Customer,

We regret to inform you that, due to tax and fiscal issues, our factory has been officially deregistered as of September 1, 2023. Consequently, we are unable to accept any new orders regarding zippers produced in our factory.

To minimize any disruption to your business, we kindly request that you make alternative arrangements during this period. We understand the importance of a reliable and consistent supply and apologize for any inconvenience caused by this change.

We would like to assure you that the operations of our Tak Tai Cheung Hong Kong company remain normal. Therefore, the styles related to YKK zippers will not be affected, and you can continue to place orders for these styles without any issues.

In the near future, we will prepare a list containing the zippers made by our factory, including the style number and the relevant vendor information. We will provide this list to you as soon as possible to assist you in finding suitable alternative suppliers for your specific requirements.

We deeply apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding in this matter. We hope to maintain a good cooperative relationship with you in the future, once our factory tax and fiscal issues are resolved.

If you have any questions or need further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We value your business and will do our best to support you during this challenging period.

Thank you for your understanding, and we look forward to continuing our partnership with you.

Best regards,

[Your Company]

Due to our factory tax and fiscal issues, our factory is officially deregistered starting from 1 September 2023
This decision was very sudden and helpless

in order not to affect you, please make arrangements during this period.

Dear Customer,

We deeply regret to inform you that, due to unforeseen tax and fiscal issues, our factory has been officially deregistered as of September 1, 2023. This decision has been sudden and has left us feeling helpless. As a result, we will be unable to accept any new orders regarding zippers produced in our factory.

We understand the significant impact this may have on your business, and we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience caused. In order to minimize the disruption, we kindly request that you make alternative arrangements during this period.

To assist you in finding suitable alternatives, we will prepare a comprehensive list of the zippers made by our factory, including the style number and the respective vendors. We will provide this list to you as soon as possible.

Please rest assured that the operations of our Tak Tai Cheung Hong Kong company remain unaffected. Therefore, any styles related to YKK zippers can still be processed and ordered without any issues.

We genuinely appreciate your understanding and cooperation during this challenging time. We truly hope that despite this change, we can maintain a good cooperative relationship moving forward.

If you have any questions or require further assistance, please do not hesitate to contact our customer support team. We remain committed to supporting you to the best of our abilities during this period of transition.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by this change and express our gratitude for your understanding. We are hopeful for the opportunity to continue our partnership with you in the future.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by this change and express our gratitude for you understanding.  In the days to come, we are still the best partners.
i wish your company a prosperous business

Dear Customer,

Thank you for your kind understanding and support during this challenging time. We genuinely appreciate your patience and cooperation as we navigate through the factory deregistration and its impact.

Please be assured that we value our partnership with you greatly, and despite this change, we remain committed to being the best possible partners for your business. We will continue to work diligently to overcome these difficulties and strive for a prosperous future.

If you have any further questions or concerns, please do not hesitate to reach out to our customer support team. We are here to assist you and ensure a smooth transition during this period.

Once again, we apologize for any inconvenience caused and express our gratitude for your understanding. We look forward to continuing our successful business relationship and witnessing mutual growth in the future.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Position]
[Your Company]
